summary: Test suite covers basic script functionality but entirely omits the GitHub Actions workflow and ACT integration—both explicitly required as mandatory in the task. Tests validate: simple matrix generation, include/exclude presence, max-parallel, fail-fast, JSON validity, and matrix size limits. Missing: workflow YAML structure validation, actionlint verification, ACT pipeline execution, act-result.txt artifact, shellcheck/bash -n validation, invalid JSON error handling, error message content validation, environment variable overrides, and combination-count accuracy. Assertions are weak (grep-based string matching on JSON rather than jq structural parsing). Fixtures and TEST_OUTPUT variables are created in setup but never used. Would not confidently catch regressions for the complete solution, and fails to validate ~50% of stated requirements.
